com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Interface InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback

  • Enclosing class:
    InputAccount

    public static interface InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onFail(java.lang.String code, java.lang.String msg)
      It will not end the procedure but you need to retry this step.
      default void onLuhnCheckResults(java.lang.String state)
      This callback is called after the user has confirmed the input card number.
      void onSuccess(java.lang.String maskedPan)
      Current step for the transaction succeeds.

    • Method Detail

      • onSuccess

        void onSuccess(java.lang.String maskedPan)
        Current step for the transaction succeeds.
        Parameters:
        maskedPan - First 6 Digits and Last 4 Digits of PAN

      • onFail

        void onFail(java.lang.String code,
            java.lang.String msg)
        It will not end the procedure but you need to retry this step.
        Parameters:
        code - See ResultConstant
        msg - fail message.

      • onLuhnCheckResults

        default void onLuhnCheckResults(java.lang.String state)
        This callback is called after the user has confirmed the input card number. If the card number meets the length requirements, the Luhn algorithm will be used to verify the card number. The result of the Luhn validation will be returned in this callback.
        Parameters:
        state - Luhn check state. STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK indicates that the card number meets the requirements. STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR indicates that the card number does not meet the requirements.
